query:
INSERT INTO drive_push_queue (target_folder, target_subpath, file_name, content_text, mime_type, status, created_at) VALUES

-- Bookshelf root README
('bookshelf', '', 'README.md',
 '# Bookshelf

Reagan''s reading library, mirrored from the dashboard.

- **Currently Reading** — what she is in the middle of
- **Future Reading** — on-deck titles she hasn''t started
- **Free Books Library** — public-domain classics she can read free anytime

Each card has a title, author, status, and where to find it. Mom and tutors can drop notes inline.
',
 'text/markdown', 'pending', NOW()),

-- Currently Reading (3)
('bookshelf', 'Currently Reading', '180 Days of Language for 5th Grade.md',
 '# 180 Days of Language for 5th Grade

**Author:** Shell Education
**Status:** In progress (unstructured)

## Where to find
- Print workbook on hand
- Publisher: https://www.tcmpub.com/teachers/180-days-of-language

## Notes
Daily grammar / mechanics warm-up. Short, 10-15 min per page.
',
 'text/markdown', 'pending', NOW()),

('bookshelf', 'Currently Reading', 'Spectrum Science Grade 5.md',
 '# Spectrum Science Grade 5

**Author:** Spectrum
**Status:** In progress (unstructured)

## Where to find
- Print workbook on hand
- Publisher: https://www.carsondellosa.com/products/spectrum-science

## Notes
Supplements the Indian Hill Science scope. Use during Science blocks when no module pages are due.
',
 'text/markdown', 'pending', NOW()),

('bookshelf', 'Currently Reading', 'Michaels World.md',
 '# Michael''s World

**Status:** In progress

## Where to find
- Indian Hill ELA Module 4 reader (provided by school)

## Notes
Independent reading text for the Breaking Barriers module. Track pages done on the dashboard.
',
 'text/markdown', 'pending', NOW()),
